text.title: Side-Project Financial Runway Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for side-project-financial-runway.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all three leave-job conditions hold AND are stress tests + geo-arbitrage scenario present?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — recompute burn with all categories
BLOCK — model geo-arbitrage even if rejected
BLOCK — add flat + declining MRR scenarios
APPROVE — model ready; decision can be made
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: burn $7000 (all categories) + savings $90k → runway 20mo + mrr_pct 0.36 + growth +12% + Lisbon geo-arbitrage + 2 stress tests + 2026-Q2 review → APPROVE → decision=stay-and-prepare (under stress -20% the runway dips below 12, so not leave yet).
